title: Lucidmon
description:
Official Modpack for LucidMon server

Preconfigured Cobblemon client to improve server experience
body:
Official Launcher to join the LucidMon Multiplayer Server!

Includes Preset Keybinds and optimised settings to make your time on LucidMon one to remember.

Comes with [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), the core of the server.

Also [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
